ogTitle: Merricks Beach vs Merrigum: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Merricks Beach and Merrigum.
heading: Merricks Beach vs Merrigum — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Merricks Beach, Victoria and Merrigum, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Merrigum has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Merricks Beach (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Merricks Beach or Merrigum safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Merricks Beach has a flood risk score of 35/100, while Merrigum scores 32/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Merricks Beach scores 24/100 for bushfire risk. Merrigum scores 23/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Merricks Beach or Merrigum?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Merrigum has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.8% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
